---
title: "PS270 Final Project"
author: Rares Matei Puiu
description: "The poll to election dialectic"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to Romania's 2024 presidential election when polling seemed to miss Calin Georgescu. I will attempt to look into whether some voters were harder to reach, less willing to say who they supported, decided late, turned out in unexpected places, or were influenced by what they were seeing online.
